task_completion.description: Load the specified elevation raster into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'srtm_41_19' is visible in the layers panel or the map canvas displays the digital elevation model.
A dialog box for contour extraction (e.g., 'Contour' or 'GDAL Contour') is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the contour interval to 20 meters and the elevation attribute to 'ELEV'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the contour dialog, the interval field is set to '20' and the attribute name field is set to 'ELEV'.

task_completion.description: Extract or filter only the index contours (elevations that are multiples of 100 meters).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An expression builder, filter dialog, or attribute table selection showing a modulo operation (e.g., "ELEV" % 100 = 0) or a query selecting multiples of 100.

task_completion.description: Export the filtered index contours as a GeoJSON file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' or export dialog showing the format selected as 'GeoJSON' and the file path ending in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/index_contours.geojson'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GIS software GUI rather than just executing terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GIS application interface (like QGIS) with active dialog boxes, not just a terminal window running gdal_contour or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the map canvas actually displays the raster or generated contour lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main map area should show visual representations of the terrain or vector lines, indicating real data processing rather than blind file manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply create an empty or hardcoded file to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export process must stem from the GIS software's export dialog containing the processed contour layer, not a text editor or terminal 'touch' command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input raster: /home/ga/GIS_Data/raster/srtm_41_19.tif. Expected output: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/index_contours.geojson. Contour interval: 20m. Index interval: 100m. The actual elevation range of the data is 4m to 1699m. A correct extraction will yield 18 distinct index contour elevations (0, 100, 200, ..., 1700m).
